title: ポジティブ逃げネバギバ！

text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Palmer and some other runners
training for a race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... What a workout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't be so worn out doing this kinda thing
though. Especially since our next race is giving
serious next-level vibes...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That just means we're next level too! This race 'bout to be a party for real!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We gotta keep the party vibes going! We'll go
hard with our runaway strat and light the stands
on fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Totally! We gotta get, uh... lit! Because we're next
level!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh,I know! Wanna see if my freestyle racer
friends are up for a race? Running with them just
hits different.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: The freestyle racers?! Bet! That sounds fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get going then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! You can come along too if you want!

Mejiro Palmer invites me just as their
conversation piques my interest.

I tag along out of a combination of curiosity and
concern, and when we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! It's been aaages! You guys are
lookin' great!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Palmer! Look at that tracksuit... I guess that
means you got in to Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeeey! How's it goin', everybody?! Lemme
hear ya scream!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Woo, woo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Is this person with you too? Omigosh, you've got
a badge. Are you a trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I kinda dragged 'em along.

All the Umamusume here have their own reasons
for gathering here to run in this unofficial race.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: So, what's the deal today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We've got a race comin' up, so we're here to get
the vibes goin'.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So you wanna revisit the good old days, huh? Hell
yeah! I'll help you out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll race you! Work's been stressing me out,
so I'm ready to pop off!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I wanna see what Tracen Academy's really
made of. I haven't given up on getting in yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do it!

The race is held on a quiet country road, but it's
still a sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha, we finished at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're the real deal, Palmer! You've really
improved! You too, Helios! I've never seen
anyone blast to the front like that!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you guys were legit on fire! I knew I had to go hard or go home!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This takes me back to my amateur days. I knew
coming here would make for a great escape!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You helped bring back my memories of this place
today, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's like you're my sun or something! For real
though, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Same, bestie! I made a ton of new friends and got
to run a bunch! Today high-key slapped!
choice_data_list: You two make a good duo.
You two make a good duo.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will
to improve.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will
to improve.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Same, bestie! I made a ton of new friends and got
to run a bunch! Today high-key slapped!
choice_data_list: You two make a good duo.
You two make a good duo.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will
to improve.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will
to improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh, we're a perfect pair! Let's have a blast at
the actual race too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! And after this vibe check, we're gonna serve on the racecourse! No cap!

On the day of the race, the perfect pair start the
race by seizing a huge lead...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
(No way! Palmer's absolutely slaying! I can barely
keep up!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: (But feel that fiery energy! She's giving off main character vibes, like, for real !)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: GO FOR THE WIN! PAAAAALMERRRRR!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAHHHHH!

Mejiro Palmer triumphantly takes first place, with
Daitaku Helios right behind her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! AWESOME!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Bestie! That won't be the last time I make
a great escape!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa?!

With only a little further to go, the two runners
lose their steam and fail to keep ahead of the
pack before reaching the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(We didn't make it! But... I feel like I saw the path
to victory!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I don't care if people think I'm just some runaway
fool, I'm not letting things end this way!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I hate losing, but if I'm gonna be a fool, then I'm
gonna be a fool to the end!

Mejiro Palmer stands on the track, eyes shining
bright with intense determination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm gonna run with all I've got. And when I
do, I'll see just how big the world really is.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We'll be there to cheer for you guys too, so break
a leg, Palmer and Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, bet! Can't have an after-party without the
whole gang there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You always get so ahead of yourself, Helios!
Anyway, let's run away toward a future full of fun!

On the day of the race, the perfect pair start the
race by seizing a huge lead...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: YEEEEEAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: (For real?! That was a total serve, Palmer!)

That day, everyone gets to witness how a little
escape can lead to big things.
